fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts floating-point shares to integers by simple truncation on line 82. This fails to distribute the remainder seats, causing the sum of allocated seats to be less than the total available seats.

constraints.intent: The sum of the final integer-allocated seats must equal the total number of seats.
The sum of the intermediate raw shares must equal the total before integer conversion.
The result produced by the integer allocation branch must sum to the total.
